title: genista tyrrhena subsp. tyrrhena
intro: Genista tyrrhena subsp. tyrrhena, also known as the Sardinian broom, is a shrub that belongs to the legume family and is native to the island of Sardinia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Genista tyrrhena subsp. tyrrhena include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its flowers and leaves, which can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or infused oils for medicinal purposes.
